stemHtml: A training aircraft is approaching an intended stall. No aural or visual indication of the impending stall is given; you feel aerodynamic buffet. Then, the stick pusher activates. What do you enter into the technical log book?

options.a: Stall warning inoperative, stall protection working.
options.b: Stall warning and stall protection working.
options.c: Stall warning and stall protection inoperative.
options.d: Stall warning working, stall protection inoperative.
